name: Cannoneer
flavor: High Noon — wheels out a surplus Army cannon. Reskin of the Operator; the Cannon is the catapult and the Blast is the Mortar token.

specialAction.name: Roll Out the Cannon
specialAction.summary: Bring the old Army Cannon to the Territory edge nearest the Cannoneer, aimed any way. Load the Blast and loose it. Every Hand within range — friend and foe — takes Lead equal to the side the Blast token landed on. No valid target needed.

effects.text: The Cannon does not require a valid target.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, move 1 Lead from one Hand's card onto any other Hand in play (including an enemy).
